ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pcb_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCB design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the PCB design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PCB design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the design was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the design belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., Draft, In Progress, Completed, Approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the design */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the design was approved */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the design completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PCB design the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer (e.g., Top Layer, Bottom Layer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the layer was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the layer was last updated */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of layer (e.g., Signal, Power, Ground) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the layer */,
  "thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the layer */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage rating of the layer */,
  "current_capacity" TEXT /* Current capacity of the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES pcb_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., Arc, Pad, Via, Track, Text, Fill, Region, Component Body) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the feature in the layer */,
  "feature_properties" TEXT /* Additional properties of the feature (e.g., color, size, shape) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_location" TEXT /* Location of the feature on the layer (e.g., coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layer_features_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PCB design being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the design */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES pcb_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PCB design being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES pcb_designs ("design_id")
)
